brand_name: SUNDOOK - FROM THE HEART OF A MOTHER

headings.usage: Use for all main section titles, hero headlines, and product names. Add 'tracking-tight' for large sizes.

body.usage: Use for paragraphs, descriptions, small labels, and buttons.

layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Use generous gaps (gap-8 or gap-12). Prioritize asymmetry where possible, except for the product grid where alignment implies catalog quality.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm for an elegant, non-bubbly look.
layout_and_spacing.shadows: Minimal. Use soft, diffuse shadows (shadow-sm or shadow-md) only on hover states for interactive cards.

buttons.primary: Solid maroon (#800020) background, white text, rounded-none or rounded-sm, px-8 py-4, text-sm uppercase tracking-widest transition-all hover:bg-[#600018].
buttons.secondary: Outline button with sage green (#788E75) or text_primary border, text_primary text, hover:bg-[#788E75] hover:text-white transition-all.

cards.style: Flat surface (no default shadow), 1px subtle border (#E5E0D8) or solid surface color (#F5EBE9). Internal generous padding (p-6 or p-8).

inputs.style: Minimalist, bottom-border only or very light full borders. However, for this project, Contact forms are omitted in favor of WhatsApp CTA.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Smooth color transitions (duration-300). Images inside cards should slightly scale up (scale-105) on parent hover.
motion_and_interactions.scroll: Fade in and slide up slightly (translate-y-4 to 0) as elements enter viewport. Use Framer Motion for graceful reveals.
motion_and_interactions.marquee: Use a slow, elegant marquee for the 'Process' section or to display brand keywords (e.g., 'Heritage • Craftsmanship • Heirloom').

icons_and_assets.library: lucide-react for UI interactions. Use thin, elegant stroke widths (strokeWidth={1.5}).

hero_background.description: Elegant wooden heirloom trunk with floral motifs.

products.description: Close-up of a carved bridal trunk with maroon velvet interior.
Large elegant wooden trousseau trunk in a sunlit room.
Artisan restoring an antique wooden trunk.

gallery.description: Mother and daughter admiring a wooden trunk.
Hands gently opening a bridal sandook.
Custom hand-painted floral motifs and engraved name plaque.

page_sections.name: Header
page_sections.instructions: Sticky header with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-md, bg-[#FAF9F6]/80). Logo in Cormorant Garamond, links, and a subtle 'Enquire' CTA.

page_sections.name: Hero
page_sections.instructions: Large background image using the hero_trunk. Add a gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-r from-[#FAF9F6]/90 via-[#FAF9F6]/60 to-transparent) to ensure text readability on the left. Headline: 'Carry a Piece of Home with You'. Subhead about mother-daughter venture. CTA: 'Pre-order Now' pointing to WhatsApp.

page_sections.name: About Us
page_sections.instructions: Tell the story of restoring the grandmother's sandook. Use a 2-column layout (Text + Image from gallery). Emphasize emotional heritage and craftsmanship.

page_sections.name: Products
page_sections.instructions: 3-column grid displaying the three core offerings (Keepsake Trunk, Trousseau Trunk, Restoration Service). Each card gets an image, short description, and a 'Request a Quote' CTA pointing to WhatsApp.

page_sections.name: Customisation & Quality
page_sections.instructions: Highlight materials (solid wood, suede) and personalisation (names, motifs, dates). Use an alternating layout or a clean bento grid. Color: Sage green surface (#E8ECE1) background for contrast.

page_sections.name: Gallery & Testimonials
page_sections.instructions: Carousel of gallery images overlaid with short beta customer testimonials. Use embla-carousel via Shadcn.

page_sections.name: Process
page_sections.instructions: Step-by-step visual timeline: Inquiry -> Design Consultation -> Deposit -> Production -> Delivery.

page_sections.name: Footer / Final CTA
page_sections.instructions: Strong call to action. Note: 'Limited slots for first batch'. Button: 'Enquire on WhatsApp'. Display placeholders for phone, email, and Instagram. Background: Maroon (#800020) with white text for high contrast ending.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure white text on maroon/sage has high contrast. Avoid pure black text on ivory, use deep grey.
